evidence.VAL-FLOW-001: FLOW-INVENTORY.md lists all 11 major flow families. All 6 commercial/finance flows (O2C #6, P2P #7, Invoice/Dealer Finance #8, Accounting/Period Close #9, HR/Payroll #10, Reporting/Export #11) have canonical packets linked (not 'packet pending'). All 6 packet files verified to exist on disk.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-002: All 6 commercial/finance flow packets contain all 6 required sections: §1 Actors (24 total actors), §2 Entrypoints (146 total endpoints), §3 Preconditions (27 precondition sets), §4 Lifecycle (34 sub-lifecycles), §5 Completion Boundary (30 completion criteria), §7 Cross-Module Dependencies (22 cross-module deps). FLOW-INVENTORY.md references all 6 packets.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-003: All 6 packets have 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' section with concrete criteria. Current Limitations: O2C (7), P2P (7), Invoice (6), Accounting (7), HR (6), Reporting (8) — 41 total. All use implemented-vs-planned language. No aspirational language found.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-004: All 6 packets have canonical vs non-canonical paths sections. Canonical: 30 paths. Deprecated: 21 paths. All deprecated paths have replacement or explicit status. Cross-module boundary notes present in all packets.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-005: All 6 packets have Open Decisions sections: O2C (5), P2P (4), Invoice (4), Accounting (4), HR (4), Reporting (5) — 26 total. All use explicit status labels.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-006: All 6 packets have Related Documentation sections with 35 unique cross-references. All verified to exist on disk. Links include module docs, FLOW-INVENTORY.md, and ADRs where applicable.
evidence.VAL-FLOW-007: All 6 packets have Security Considerations sections. P2P and Accounting have dedicated Event/Listener Boundaries sections. Reporting/Export acceptably omits Event/Listener section (read-only flow). Non-obvious gates surfaced: erp.inventory.accounting.events.enabled toggle, OPERATIONAL_DISPATCH predicate, host isolation, module gating.
